Ability.Name: B:Dancing Rune Weapon
Ability.Lua: if IsBoss() and runpow(49028) and CanAttack() and not CooldownRemains(49028) and rangeCheck(49930, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Death and Decay
Ability.Lua: if IsLeftShiftKeyDown() and not GetCurrentKeyBoardFocus() and not UnitChannelInfo("player") then CastSpellByID(49938) if SpellIsTargeting() then CameraOrSelectOrMoveStart() CameraOrSelectOrMoveStop() end return true end

Ability.Name: F:Howling Blast
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and freezf and not CooldownRemains(51411) and rangeCheck(51411, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Death Coil
Ability.Lua: if runpow(49895) and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49895, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Death Coil (Max RP)
Ability.Lua: if UnitPowerMax("player") == UnitPower("player") and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49895, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Death Strike
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and FrostFever and BloodPlague and rangeCheck(49924, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Rune Strike
Ability.Lua: if valid("target", 56815) and runpow(56815) and CanAttack() and rangeCheck2(49930, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: B:Heart Strike
Ability.Lua:
local BR = select(2, BloodRuneCD())
if BR >= 1 and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") and FrostFever and BloodPlague then return true end

Ability.Name: -- Hotkeys --
Ability.Lua:
if not leftkeydown then leftkeydown = 0 end
if modtime == nil then modtime = 0 end
if IsLeftControlKeyDown() and GetTime() - leftkeydown > 1 then leftkeydown = GetTime() if StopRota then StopRota = false PQR_WriteToChat("Rotation \124cFF15E615reenabled!") else StopRota = true PQR_WriteToChat("Rotation \124cFFE61515stopped!") end end if PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay then PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay() end

Ability.Name: -- Start Fight --
Ability.Lua: if StopRota or IsMounted() or UnitInVehicle("player") or UnitIsDeadOrGhost("target") or UnitIsDeadOrGhost("player") or UnitChannelInfo("player") ~= nil or UnitCastingInfo("player") ~= nil or UnitBuff("target", 59301) or UnitBuff("player", GetSpellInfo(430)) or UnitBuff("player", GetSpellInfo(433)) then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Deathchill
Ability.Lua: if not deathchill then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Summon Gargoyle
Ability.Lua: if runpow(49206) and IsBoss() and CanAttack() and not CooldownRemains(49206) and rangeCheck(49930, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Empower Rune Weapon
Ability.Lua: if IsBoss() and RuneCD() >= 5 and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: -- Offensive Spells --
Ability.Lua:
local buff = { 642, 45438, 31224, 23920, 33786, 19263, 21892, 40733 } local mob = { "Training Dummy", "Raider's Training Dummy" } local elite = { } local noaggromobs = nil local immunity = nil local eliteboss = nil
for i,v in ipairs(buff) do if UnitBuffID("target",v) then immunity = 1 end end
for i,v in ipairs(mob) do if UnitName("target") == v then noaggromobs = 1 end end
if immunity or UnitCanAttack("player","target") == nil or (UnitAffectingCombat("target") == nil and noaggromobs == nil and UnitIsPlayer("target") == nil) or tonumber(UnitGUID("target"):sub(5,5),16) == 4 then return true end
for i,v in ipairs(elite) do if UnitName("target") == v then eliteboss = 1 end end
IsBoss = nil function IsBoss() if UnitExists("target") and ( UnitLevel("target") == -1 or eliteboss ) or tonumber(UnitGUID("target"):sub(5,5),16) == 4 then return true end end

Ability.Name: F:Horn of Winter
Ability.Lua: if not Horn then return true end

Ability.Name: -- All:Mouseover --
Ability.Lua: if UnitAffectingCombat("player") and IsMouseButtonDown() then RunMacroText("/click "..GetMouseFocus():GetName()) end

Ability.Name: F:Frost Presence
Ability.Lua: if not fPres then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Howling Blast (AOE)
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and not CooldownRemains(51411) and rangeCheck(51411, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Scourge Strike
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and FrostFever and BloodPlague and rangeCheck(55271, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: B:Rune Tap
Ability.Lua:
local BR = select(2, BloodRuneCD()) local DR = select(2, DeathRuneCD())
if getHp("player") < 45 and ( BR >= 1 or DR >= 1 ) then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Raise Dead
Ability.Lua: if UnitExists("pet") == nil and not UnitBuffID("player", 61431) and ( GetItemCount(37201) >= 1 or glyph(60200) ) then return true end

Ability.Name: B:Blood Boil
Ability.Lua:
local BR = select(2, BloodRuneCD()) local DR = select(2, DeathRuneCD())
if ( BR >= 1 or DR >= 1 ) and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") and FrostFever and BloodPlague then return true end

Ability.Name: B:Blood Tap
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and select(1, BloodRuneCD()) >= 1 and rangeCheck(49930, "target") and not CooldownRemains(45529) then return true end

Ability.Name: B:Blood Presence
Ability.Lua: if not bPres then return true end

Ability.Name: B:Blood Strike
Ability.Lua:
local BR = select(2, BloodRuneCD())
if BR >= 1 and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") and FrostFever and BloodPlague then return true end

Ability.Name: B:Hysteria
Ability.Lua: if IsBoss() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") and not CooldownRemains(49016) then if UnitExists("focus") == nil and not hyst then CastSpellByID(49016, "player") return true elseif UnitExists("focus") ~= nil and not UnitBuffID("focus", 49016) then CastSpellByID(49016, "focus") return true end end

Ability.Name: U:Bone Shield
Ability.Lua: if not bonshield then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Chains of Ice
Ability.Lua: if IsLeftAltKeyDown( ) and GetCurrentKeyBoardFocus() == nil then if UnitIsEnemy("player", "mouseover") and UnitIsDead("mouseover") == nil then return true end end

Ability.Name: F:Frost Strike
Ability.Lua: if runpow(55268) and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") and FrostFever and BloodPlague then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Frost Strike (TM)
Ability.Lua: if runpow(55268) and killmachine and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") and FrostFever and BloodPlague then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Icebound Fortitude
Ability.Lua: if getHp("player") < 40 and runpow(48792) and not CooldownRemains(48792) then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Icy Touch
Ability.Lua:
local FrostFever, _, _, _, _, _, ffexpire = UnitDebuffID("target",55095, "player")
if FrostFever ~= nil then ffexpire =(ffexpire - GetTime()) if ffexpire < 2 and rangeCheck(49909, "target") and CanAttack() then return true end else return true end

Ability.Name: B:Mark of Blood
Ability.Lua:
local BR = select(2, BloodRuneCD()) local DR = select(2, DeathRuneCD())
if ( BR >= 1 or DR >= 1 ) and getHp("player") < 39 and not CooldownRemains(49005) then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Obliterate
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and FrostFever and BloodPlague and rangeCheck(51425, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Pestilence (Renew)
Ability.Lua:
local BR = select(2, BloodRuneCD()) local DR = select(2, DeathRuneCD())
if ( BR >= 1 or DR >= 1 ) and CanAttack() and glyph(63334) and rangeCheck(50842, "target") and ( ( FrostFever ~= nil and select(7, UnitDebuffID("target", 55095, "player")) - GetTime() <= 5 ) or ( BloodPlague ~= nil and select(7, UnitDebuffID("target", 55078, "player")) - GetTime() <= 5 ) ) then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Unbreakable Armor
Ability.Lua: if IsBoss() and CanAttack() and not CooldownRemains(51271) and rangeCheck(49930, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: F:Unbreakable Armor (Tank)
Ability.Lua: if getHp("player") < 60 and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: B:Vampiric Blood
Ability.Lua:
local BR = select(2, BloodRuneCD()) local DR = select(2, DeathRuneCD())
if ( BR >= 1 or DR >= 1 ) and getHp("player") < 70 then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Plague Strike
Ability.Lua:
local BloodPlague, _, _, _, _, _, BloodPlagueExpire = UnitDebuffID("target",55078, "player")
if BloodPlague ~= nil then --cast if debuff has < 2 sec left BloodPlagueExpire =(BloodPlagueExpire - GetTime()) if BloodPlagueExpire < 2 and rangeCheck(49921, "target") and CanAttack() then return true end else return true end

Ability.Name: -- DarhangeR --
Ability.Lua: -- I'm the original developer of dat profiles. Any changes, copying or sharing without my knowledge direct copyright infringement. For more info: -- Discord: https://discord.com/users/250267265285488641

Ability.Name: U:Unholy Presence
Ability.Lua: if not uPres then return true end

Ability.Name: -- Interrupt Engine --
Ability.Lua:
-- New Interrupt Engine // Новый движок-- if xelperInterruptInit == nil then xelperInterruptInit = true function PQR_InterruptSpell() local _, playerClass = UnitClass("player")
if playerClass == "DEATHKNIGHT" then return 47528 elseif playerClass == "HUNTER" then return 34490 elseif playerClass == "MAGE" then return 2139 elseif playerClass == "PRIEST" then return 15487 elseif playerClass == "ROGUE" then return 1766 elseif playerClass == "SHAMAN" then return 57994 else return 0 end end end
-- Сore / Ядро --
local customTarget = "target" local castName, _, _, _, castStartTime, castEndTime, _, _, castInterruptable = UnitCastingInfo(customTarget) local channelName, _, _, _, channelStartTime, channelEndTime, _, channelInterruptable = UnitChannelInfo(customTarget)
if channelName ~= nil then --target is channeling a spell that is interruptable --load the channel variables into the cast variables to make logic a little easier. castName = channelName castStartTime = channelStartTime castEndTime = channelEndTime castInterruptable = channelInterruptable end
--This is actually "Not Interruptable"... so lets swap it around to use in the positive. if castInterruptable == false then castInterruptable = true else castInterruptable = false end
--we can't attack the target. if UnitCanAttack("player", customTarget) == nil then return false end
if castInterruptable then --target is casting something that is interruptable. --the following 2 variables are named logically... value is in seconds. local timeSinceStart = (GetTime() * 1000 - castStartTime) / 1000 local timeLeft = ((GetTime() * 1000 - castEndTime) * -1) / 1000 local castTime = castEndTime - castStartTime local currentPercent = timeSinceStart / castTime * 100000
--interrupt percentage check if currentPercent < PQR_InterruptPercent then return false end
--minimum interrupt time. if timeSinceStart - PQR_InterruptDelay < 0 then return false end
--make sure the interrupt spell is available local interruptSpell = 47528 if interruptSpell ~= 0 then
local interruptName = GetSpellInfo(interruptSpell) if not PQR_SpellAvailable(interruptSpell) or not IsSpellInRange(interruptName, customTarget) then return false end else return false end
--Finally, make sure the spell they are casting is on the interrupt list or interrupt all is checked --if PQR_IsInterruptAll() then PQR_Debug("Casting interrupt on "..customTarget) CastSpellByID(interruptSpell, customTarget) return true --end
end
--PQR_InterruptStarted is a global flag to indicate that a new interrupt rotation has started.
if not PQR_InterruptStart then PQR_InterruptStart = true
--Only interrupt these abilities: --PQR_AddInterrupt("Holy Light") --PQR_AddInterrupt("Flash of Light") --PQR_AddInterrupt(GetSpellInfo(16914)) --Hurricane
--This is the delay before interrupting in seconds. PQR_InterruptDelay = 0.15
--This is the percentage of the cast to wait before interrupting PQR_InterruptPercent = math.random(30,60) end
if not spells then spells = { "Greater Heal", --Priest Heal "Penance", --Priest Direct channel heal "Flash Heal", --Priest quick big heal" "Heal", --Priest normal heal "Binding Heal", --Priest heal for themself and another "Lesser Heal", --Priest small heal "Prayer of Healing", --Priest AoE heal "Chain Heal", --Shaman AoE heal "Healing Wave", --Shaman heal "Lesser Healing Wave", --Shaman minor heal "Flash of Light", --Paladin quick heal "Holy Light", --Paladin small heal "Nourish", --Druid heals "Healing Touch", --Druid heal "Regrowth", --Druid AoE "Rebirth", --Druid brez "Tranquility", --Druid AoE heal "Hex", --Shaman CC "Cyclone", "Polymorph" } end

Ability.Name: -- Function --
-- All:Racial --
Ability.Lua:
local debuff = { 6215, 8122, 5484, 2637, 5246, 6358 } local hracial = { 33697, 20572, 33702, 26297 } local alracial = { 20594, 28880 } local hrace = { "Troll", "Orc" } local alrace = { "Dwarf", "Draenei" } local myrace = UnitRace("player")
-- Undead -- for i = 1, #debuff do if UnitDebuffID("player",debuff[i]) and UnitRace("player") == "Undead" and IsSpellKnown(7744) and not CooldownRemains(7744) and CanAttack() then CastSpellByID(7744) return true end end
-- Horde race -- if IsBoss() and CanAttack() and tContains(hrace, UnitRace("player")) then for i = 1, #hracial do if IsSpellKnown(hracial[i]) and not CooldownRemains(hracial[i]) then CastSpellByID(hracial[i]) return true end end end
-- Ally race -- if CanAttack() and getHp("player") <= 35 and tContains(alrace, UnitRace("player")) then for i = 1, #alracial do if IsSpellKnown(alracial[i]) and not CooldownRemains(alracial[i]) then CastSpellByID(alracial[i]) return true end end end

Ability.Name: U:Pestilence (AOE)
Ability.Lua: if IsLeftAltKeyDown() and not GetCurrentKeyBoardFocus() then CastSpellByID(50842) if SpellIsTargeting() then CameraOrSelectOrMoveStart() CameraOrSelectOrMoveStop() end return true end

Ability.Name: B:Death Pact
Ability.Lua: if getHp("player") < 17 and UnitExists("pet") and runpow(48743) and not CooldownRemains(48743) then CastSpellByID(48743) else if UnitExists("pet") == nil and getHp("player") < 17 and not CooldownRemains(46584) and ( GetSpellInfo(46584) or GetItemCount(37201) >= 1 or glyph(60200) ) then CastSpellByID(46584) return true end end

Ability.Name: -- Autotarget script --
Ability.Lua: if UnitAffectingCombat("player") and (not UnitExists("target") or (UnitExists("target") and not UnitCanAttack("player", "target"))) then RunMacroText("/targetenemy") return true end

Ability.Name: U:Ghoul Frenzy
Ability.Lua:
local UR = select(2, UnholyRuneCD()) local DR = select(1, DeathRuneCD())
if UnitExists("pet") and getHp("pet") < 30 and ( UR >= 1 or DR >= 1 ) and not gfrenzy and rangeCheck(63560, "pet") then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Death Coil (HPet)
Ability.Lua: if getHp("pet") < 40 and runpow(49895) and UnitExists("pet") and (not UnitIsDeadOrGhost("pet")) and UnitInRange("pet") and rangeCheck(49895, "pet") then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Death Strike (Lich)
Ability.Lua: if getHp("player") < 65 and CanAttack() and FrostFever and BloodPlague and rangeCheck(49924, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: U:Death Coil (Range)
Ability.Lua: if runpow(49895) and CanAttack() and not rangeCheck(49930, "target") then return true end

Ability.Name: -- DK Stuff --
Ability.Lua: -- DK Stuff -- -- Dots -- FrostFever = UnitDebuffID("target", 55095, "player") BloodPlague = UnitDebuffID("target", 55078, "player") UBlight = UnitDebuffID("target", 50536, "player") ICluch = UnitDebuffID("target", 50436, "player") CoS = UnitDebuffID("target", 45524, "player") DrW = UnitDebuffID("target", 49028, "player") gargoyle = UnitDebuffID("target", 49206, "player") hungercold = UnitDebuffID("target", 49203, "player") -- Procs -- icytalons = UnitBuffID("player", 58578) killmachine = UnitBuffID("player", 51124) freezf = UnitBuffID("player", 59052) -- Buffs -- hyst = UnitBuffID("player", 49016) btap = UnitBuffID("player", 45529) vampblood = UnitBuffID("player", 55233) deathchill = UnitBuffID("player", 49796) lich = UnitBuffID("player", 49039) unbarmor = UnitBuffID("player", 51271) amshell = UnitBuffID("player", 48707) bonshield = UnitBuffID("player", 49222) gfrenzy = UnitBuffID("pet", 63560) Horn = UnitBuffID("player", 57623) -- Presence -- bPres = UnitBuffID("player", 48266) fPres = UnitBuffID("player", 48263) uPres = UnitBuffID("player", 48265) if PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay then PQR_UpdateStatusOverlay() end

Ability.Name: F:Icy Touch (DPS)
Ability.Lua:
local FrostFever, _, _, _, _, _, ffexpire = UnitDebuffID("target", 55095, "player")
if FrostFever ~= nil then ffexpire =(ffexpire - GetTime()) if ( ffexpire < 2 or not icytalons ) and rangeCheck(49909, "target") and CanAttack() then return true end else return true end

Ability.Name: -- All:Healthstone --
Ability.Lua:
local stones = { 36892, 36893, 36894 }
for i = 1, #stones do if getHp("player") <= 25 and GetItemCount(stones[i]) >= 1 and not ItemCooldownRemains(stones[i]) then UseItemByName(stones[i]) end end

Ability.Name: -- All:Potions --
Ability.Lua:
hpot = { 33447, 43569, 40087, 41166, 40067 }
for i = 1, #hpot do if getHp("player") <= 12 and GetItemCount(hpot[i]) >= 1 and not ItemCooldownRemains(hpot[i]) then UseItemByName(hpot[i]) end end

Ability.Name: F:Lichborne
Ability.Lua:
local debuff = { 6215, 8122, 5484, 2637, 5246, 6358 }
for i,v in ipairs(debuff) do if UnitDebuffID("player",v) and ( CooldownRemains(7744) or not IsSpellKnown(7744) ) and CanAttack() then CastSpellByID(49039) return true end end

Ability.Name: U:Anti-Magic Shell
B:Dark Command
Ability.Lua: if CanAttack() and not UnitIsDeadOrGhost("targettarget") and UnitAffectingCombat("player") and rangeCheck(56222, "target") and not CooldownRemains(56222) and ( UnitDebuffID("targettarget", 72410) or UnitDebuffID("targettarget", 72411) or threat("player") < 2 ) then return true end

Ability.Name: Use:Trinkets/Hands
Ability.Lua:
local _,cd,havecd = GetInventoryItemCooldown("player",13)
if cd == 0 and havecd == 1 and IsBoss() and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") then UseInventoryItem(13) return true end
local _,cd,havecd = GetInventoryItemCooldown("player",14)
if cd == 0 and havecd == 1 and IsBoss() and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") then UseInventoryItem(14) return true end
local _,cd,havecd = GetInventoryItemCooldown("player",10)
if cd == 0 and havecd == 1 and IsBoss() and CanAttack() and rangeCheck(49930, "target") then UseInventoryItem(10) return true end
